title: centaurea × stojanovii
intro: Centaurea × stojanovii, also known as Stojanov's knapweed, is a hybrid plant species in the family Asteraceae, resulting from the cross between Centaurea jacea and Centaurea montana. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea × stojanovii include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Centaurea × stojanovii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
